compressed_prompt: Compare Federer vs Nadal, answer "yes", "no", or "maybe".
response:
Here are some comparisons between Roger Federer and Rafael Nadal:

| Category | Federer | Nadal | Answer |
|---|---|---|---|
| More Grand Slam titles (all-time) | 20 | 22 | **No** (Federer has fewer) |
| Better on clay | Weaker | Dominant | **No** (Nadal is better) |
| Better on grass | Dominant | Weaker | **Yes** (Federer is better) |
| More Wimbledon titles | 8 | 2 | **Yes** |
| More French Open titles | 1 | 14 | **No** |
| Better serve | Strong | Weaker | **Yes** |
| Better head-to-head record | 16 wins | 24 wins | **No** |
| Considered more elegant/stylish | Generally yes | Generally no | **Yes** |
| Better forehand (debated) | Strong | Arguably stronger | **Maybe** |
| Greater overall GOAT claim | Debated | Debated | **Maybe** |

Would you like me to dive deeper into any specific comparison?
